calendar.matters:
RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kamran Sheikh, Appellant/Defendant in Pro Per, present.
Jeff Smejkal, Collection Supervisor for City and County of San Francisco, with Doran Gin, Senior Collection Officer, also present as Respondents/Plaintiffs.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Jeff Smejkal testifies on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco.

Kamran Sheikh, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf.

No new evidence admitted. The Court finds in favor of Respondent/Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco and against Appellant/Defendant Kamran Sheikh in the amount of $1,750.00 together with $40.39 in costs for a total award of $1,790.39.

Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: Vicki Mack, Not Reported (D514)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Continued To Jul-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
